name: @ttsc/lint
description: Reference ttsc plugin: ESLint-style lint rules hosted in the same Program/Checker as the type-check pass.
author: Jeongho Nam

deprecation.rationale: @ttsc/lint is a curated reference implementation. The strongly preferred outcome is for eslint / @typescript-eslint maintainers to take ownership of the host slot. If they do, this package will be deprecated and re-pointed at theirs.
